episodes.title: Inside the Duggar Empire: How Jim Bob Kept Control — and the Cash
episodes.description: As a grown woman with her own children, Jill Duggar still needed her father’s permission to enter the family compound. Her husband says Jim Bob Duggar controlled their TLC contracts and paychecks, making major decisions without their real consent. Jill calls it cult-like. For ten years, millions saw the Duggars as wholesome family TV — but behind the cameras was a business built on control. In Part 2 of our five-part Hidden Killers Duggar series, Tony Brueski digs into the financial structure, network relationship, and what those who grew up inside say it truly cost them. Troubling information about the family surfaced online in 2007. TLC aired the show until 2015, canceled it — then launched a spinoff that lasted eleven seasons, ending only after Josh Duggar’s federal arrest. Two cancellations. Two apologies. One steady stream of profit in between. This is Part 2 of 5. This series contains commentary and opinion based on publicly available information. All individuals are presumed innocent until proven guilty in a court of law.
